task: I need to leave a note about a room problem for the next shift, and I want it to be easy for them to understand when they see it later. Can you help me put the details in a simple order so nothing important gets missed?

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here’s a simple order you can use for the note:

1. Room number  
2. What the problem is  
3. What it affects  
4. What has already been done  
5. Who needs to be informed next

If you want, I can also turn your specific room details into a clean handoff note for you.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that order works. But I need it a little more useful than that — like a plain note format I can fill in fast. Something with blanks maybe. Room number, problem, what I already did, and if maintenance or front desk needs to know. Keep it simple.

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a simple fill-in note you can use:

Room: _____  
Problem: _____  
What I already did: _____  
Needs to be told: Maintenance / Front Desk / Next Shift  
Guest aware: Yes / No

If you want, I can also make it into a one-line version for quick writing.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Simple enough to use without messing around. I can fill that in fast on a busy shift.
